title: 时间点与时间段
prompt_en: Practice using at for points in time and in for periods.
prompt_zh: 练习用at表达时间点、in表达时间段。
description: 掌握at+钟表时间/in+月份年份/on+具体日期的基本规则。
knowledge_points: 时间介词 时间点 时间段 具体日期

title: 持续与起止
prompt_en: Practice using during since for until by to talk about duration.
prompt_zh: 练习用during/since/for/until/by表达持续和起止。
description: 区分since(从某时起)/for(持续多久)/by(截止到)/until(直到)。
knowledge_points: 持续 起止 for since until

title: 先后顺序
prompt_en: Practice using before after first then next to describe sequence.
description: 掌握时间连词表达事件先后关系的基本结构。
knowledge_points: 先后 before after 顺序

title: 同时与截止
prompt_en: Practice using when while until as to describe simultaneous actions.
prompt_zh: 练习用when/while/until/as描述同时发生和截止时间。
description: 学习when/while(同时)和until(直到)的用法区别。
